name: haproxy
explanation: HAProxy supports two collection modes: a Prometheus exporter (HAProxy 2+ exposes `/metrics` on a configurable port, often 8404) which is unauthenticated and OpenMetrics-compatible, and the legacy stats page (`/admin?stats` or similar) which typically needs HTTP basic auth. A discovery layer must probe `/metrics` first and fall back to the stats page; classification is custom because of the multi-mode logic, but the OpenMetrics path is the easy case.
notes: If only OpenMetrics mode were considered, this would be generic; the legacy mode pulls it into custom.
